name: SyncView AI Onboarding — Submit
description: POST /webhook/ai-onboarding-submit. Body {submission}. Inserts the AI-funnel onboarding submission into Supabase ai_client_onboarding (service role) and DMs Sidney on Slack. Supabase write gates the 200 so a submission is never silently lost. Clone of onboarding-submit for the /ai_onboarding_form funnel.
